Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover F1AP UE Context Setup
Feature_Description: This feature describes the procedure where the gNB-CU prepares and sends an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to a candidate gNB-DU.
The candidate gNB-DU is then required to respond with an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message.
This message exchange is specifically handled on the gNB-CU for the purpose of an Inter-gNB-DU LTM (Local Traffic Management) handover.
Feature_Objectives: To establish the UE context in the candidate gNB-DU during an Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
To enable the gNB-CU to receive confirmation and necessary configuration from the candidate gNB-DU for the successful execution of the LTM handover.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU prepares the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message, containing information necessary for the UE context setup at the candidate gNB-DU for the Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
The gNB-CU sends the prepared F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to the candidate gNB-DU.
The candidate gNB-DU receives and processes the 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message, establishing the UE context.
The candidate gNB-DU prepares and sends the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message back to the gNB-CU, indicating the outcome of the UE context setup.
The gNB-CU receives and handles the 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message to proceed with the Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU decides to initiate an Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover, triggering the UE context setup procedure towards a candidate gNB-DU.
The gNB-CU prepares the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message, which may include handover-specific configurations and UE context information relevant for the LTM handover.
The gNB-CU transmits the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to the selected candidate gNB-DU.
Upon reception, the candidate gNB-DU processes the 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST', allocates necessary resources, and establishes the UE context for the incoming UE.
The candidate gNB-DU then formulates and sends the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message to the gNB-CU, confirming the successful setup of the UE context or indicating any issues.
The gNB-CU receives and processes the 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message, using the information to finalize the LTM handover procedure.

Code_Instructions.description: Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, which is essential for preparing the message at the gNB-CU and parsing it at the gNB-DU during an Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, used by the gNB-DU to report the outcome of the UE context setup to the gNB-CU during an Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.

A helper function responsible for populating the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message structure with relevant UE context information from the gNB-CU's internal state, prior to encoding and transmission.

This function likely handles the encoding, serialization, or specific formatting of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message for transmission over the F1 interface, acting as a bridge between RRC and F1AP protocol handling.
A utility function for deriving the gNB security key (skgNB). This is a crucial building block for establishing the security context as part of the overall UE context setup at the target gNB-DU.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
